description_long: This object is a stylized bust of a human head mounted on a multi-tiered rectangular pedestal. The head features a prominent set of over-ear headphones with a coiled cable, and the face is partially covered by a smooth, dark visor or mask, giving it a futuristic or robotic appearance. The headphones have visible ear cups, a headband, and a microphone boom extending from one side. The pedestal is solid and geometric, with three stacked rectangular sections of decreasing size. The overall color scheme is monochromatic, with shades of gray and black dominating the structure. The object appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with some electronic components likely housed within the head and headphones.
description: A futuristic bust of a human head with large headphones and a visor, mounted on a multi-tiered rectangular pedestal. The design is sleek, robotic, and monochromatic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the head, the headphones, and the microphone boom extending forward.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the head, the headband of the headphones, and the coiled cable.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the microphone boom visible on the other side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the face covered by a visor, the full headphones, and the pedestal's front.
